name: Dendrobium
summary: It should be framed conservatively because luxury-tonic narratives often exceed evidence depth.
description: It should be framed conservatively because luxury-tonic narratives often exceed evidence depth.
contraindications: blood pressure medication because dendrobium may have an additive blood-pressure-lowering effect and risk excessive hypotension
diabetes medication because dendrobium has documented hypoglycemic activity and may have an additive blood-glucose-lowering effect
doses beyond typical tonic use because overdose has been associated with convulsions in traditional medicine reports
pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance due to insufficient safety data

sources.title: Genome-wide researches and applications on Dendrobium
